error.signature: Remote code execution — unsafe deserialization of untrusted data
error.regex: ([Dd]eserializ.*RCE|pickle.*untrusted|ObjectInputStream.*untrusted|insecure.*deserializ|Remote\ code\ execution\ —\ unsafe\ deserialization\ of\ untrusted\ )

verdict.summary: Using pickle or Java ObjectInputStream on untrusted input allows arbitrary code execution.

dead_ends.action: Validate the serialized data before deserializing
dead_ends.why_fails: The exploit triggers during deserialization itself, not after

dead_ends.action: Use a custom ObjectInputStream with class whitelist alone
dead_ends.why_fails: Gadget chains can use allowed classes to achieve code execution

workarounds.action: Replace unsafe deserializers with safe formats like JSON or Protobuf
If pickle is required, use RestrictedUnpickler with strict class allowlist
workarounds.how: class SafeUnpickler(pickle.Unpickler): def find_class(self, module, name): ...
